title: ferray-numpy-interop: no f16/bf16 support in any backend
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

ferray-core supports f16 and bf16 via the half crate, and Arrow has Float16Type. NumPy supports float16. But none of the interop traits (ArrowElement, NpElement, PolarsElement) are implemented for half::f16 or half::bf16. ML pipelines frequently use float16 for model weights. Add f16 support behind the f16 feature flag at least for Arrow (which has native Float16Type) and NumPy (which supports float16).
